name: Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Ltd. (MSEDCL)
address: MSEDCL Sub-Division Office, Mahape, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra
payment_terms: Monthly billing — pay before due date to avoid surcharge
notes: Statutory electricity utility. Connection number, sanctioned load and consumer number to be recorded in legal register. Demand charge, power factor penalty and consumption tracked monthly for energy monitoring (ISO 14001 significant environmental aspect).
